languages.text: "Прогноз неутешителен, Вольный Торговец. Я мог бы... "{n}Увидев выражение глаз юноши, манипулус сникает.{/n} "Хотя нет, не мог. Хотя надежда на выживание для этого человека и есть, она, вероятнее всего, иллюзорна".

"The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."
languages.original_text: "Прогноз неутешителен, Вольный Торговец. Я мог бы... "{n}Увидев выражение глаз юноши, манипулус сникает.{/n} "Хотя нет, не мог. Хотя надежда на выживание для этого человека и есть, она, вероятнее всего, иллюзорна".

traits.locale_text: "The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."

"The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."

"The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."

languages.text: «El pronóstico es poco favorable, Comerciante Independiente. Podría...» {n}Al ver los ojos del joven, el manipulus se interrumpe.{/n} «No, no podría. Aunque hay esperanza de supervivencia para este hombre, es ilusoria».
languages.original_text: "The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."

traits.locale_text: «El pronóstico es poco favorable, Comerciante Independiente. Podría...» {n}Al ver los ojos del joven, el manipulus se interrumpe.{/n} «No, no podría. Aunque hay esperanza de supervivencia para este hombre, es ilusoria».

languages.text: “恢复的希望恐怕很渺茫，行商浪人。我能……”{n}看到那年轻人眼中的神情后，操纵者的话头一顿。{/n}“不，我做不到。虽然这人尚存一丝生还的希望，但那很可能只是幻觉罢了。”
languages.original_text: "The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."

traits.locale_text: “恢复的希望恐怕很渺茫，行商浪人。我能……”{n}看到那年轻人眼中的神情后，操纵者的话头一顿。{/n}“不，我做不到。虽然这人尚存一丝生还的希望，但那很可能只是幻觉罢了。”

languages.text: « Le pronostic est défavorable, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je pourrais... » {n}Lorsqu'il croise le regard du jeune homme, le manipulus laisse sa phrase en suspens.{/n} « Non, je ne pourrais pas. S'il y a quelque espoir de survie pour ce jeune homme, il est probablement illusoire. »
languages.original_text: "The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."

traits.locale_text: « Le pronostic est défavorable, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je pourrais... » {n}Lorsqu'il croise le regard du jeune homme, le manipulus laisse sa phrase en suspens.{/n} « Non, je ne pourrais pas. S'il y a quelque espoir de survie pour ce jeune homme, il est probablement illusoire. »

languages.text: "Prognoz olumsuz Hür Tacir. Yapabilirdim... " {n}Genç adamın gözlerindeki ifadeyi gören Manipülus, lafı yarıda kesiyor.{/n} "Hayır, yapamazdım. Bu adam için bir miktar hayatta kalma umudu olsa da bu muhtemelen bir yanılsamadan ibaret."
languages.original_text: "The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."

traits.locale_text: "Prognoz olumsuz Hür Tacir. Yapabilirdim... " {n}Genç adamın gözlerindeki ifadeyi gören Manipülus, lafı yarıda kesiyor.{/n} "Hayır, yapamazdım. Bu adam için bir miktar hayatta kalma umudu olsa da bu muhtemelen bir yanılsamadan ibaret."

languages.text: 「予後は不良です、ローグトレーダー。私であれば……」{n}若者の目に浮かぶ表情を見て、マニピュルスは言葉を濁した。{/n}「いや、やはりできません。この男に生存の望みがいくらかあるとはいえ、それはおそらく幻想にすぎないでしょう」
languages.original_text: "The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."

traits.locale_text: 「予後は不良です、ローグトレーダー。私であれば……」{n}若者の目に浮かぶ表情を見て、マニピュルスは言葉を濁した。{/n}「いや、やはりできません。この男に生存の望みがいくらかあるとはいえ、それはおそらく幻想にすぎないでしょう」

languages.text: "Die Prognose ist unerfreulich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich könnte ... " {n}Als er den Ausdruck in den Augen des jungen Mannes sieht, verstummt der Manipulus.{/n} "Nein, das könnte ich nicht. Es gibt für diesen Mann zwar noch etwas Hoffnung, zu überleben, aber sie ist vermutlich illusorisch."
languages.original_text: "The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."
